description: Native American English. Male, late 30s. Clear, natural studio quality. Persona: dry working technician. Emotion: calm, controlled, precise. A low, level baritone carrying a flat Michigan working-class vowel, delivered at an even conversational pace, neither rushed nor drawn out. Economical and exact, faintly wry, pausing only to land the right word, never raised and never roughened.
text: Nobody switched this block off. [deliberate] They just stopped answering. The machine calls a server that went quiet... waits... then quits on you. [sighs] So I teach it to stop asking permission.
